summary: Iteration 29 - Sessions Calendar & Font Controls Testing COMPLETE. All features verified: Admin form has inline font controls (color picker, font family, font size, Bold, Italic) below Title and Description fields. Interactive calendar with Fill 30/60 Days buttons, Clear All, and min 7 days advance + Sat/Sun auto-disabled. Homepage and Session Detail calendars enforce min 7 days advance booking with weekend dates in red and disabled.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx: Font controls are INLINE (not hidden) below Title and Description inputs - includes color picker, font family dropdown (Default, Cinzel, Playfair, Lato, Montserrat), font size dropdown, Bold (B) and Italic (I) buttons
AdminPanel.jsx: Interactive calendar with Su/Sa headers in red (text-red-300), dates within 7 days grayed out, weekend dates styled red and disabled
AdminPanel.jsx: Fill 30 Days (Mon-Fri) and Fill 60 Days buttons generate weekday dates starting from today+7 days - confirmed working
SessionsSection.jsx: MiniCalendar enforces min 7 days advance (isPast checks date < today+7) and disables weekends (isWeekend checks dow === 0 or 6)
SessionDetailPage.jsx: BookingCalendar has same min 7 days + weekend disabled logic with red headers for Su/Sa
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Calendar_Session_Iteration29 with 22 available_dates, time_slot '10:00 AM'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sessions calendar and font controls fully verified. Admin form has inline font controls visible immediately (no need to expand). Calendar component shows Su/Sa in red, dates within 7 days grayed out, weekends not clickable. Fill 30/60 Days buttons work correctly generating weekday dates only. Homepage MiniCalendar and detail page BookingCalendar both enforce the same rules.
